name: inspired-product
description: Build empowered product teams using discovery and delivery dual-track. Use when the user mentions "product discovery", "empowered teams", "feature factory", "product roadmap", "opportunity assessment", "product vision", "product-led growth", or "discovery vs delivery". Also trigger when restructuring product teams away from output-driven models, setting product strategy, or defining what to build next based on outcomes. author: wondelai
summary_zh: 用探索与交付双轨制打造赋能产品团队的实战指南，能帮你摆脱功能工厂模式，适合制定产品战略、重组团队或基于业务结果决定下一步做什么的场景。
